name: Diesel, combusted in industrial equipment
description:
USLCI's flow did not include conversion units.
The mass density is taken from the USLCI flow "Diesel, at refinery"
The energy density (137381 BTU/gal, ~38290.32 MJ/m3) is taken from https://www.epa.gov/system/files/documents/2022-10/Default%20Heat%20Content%20Ratios%20for%20Help%20and%20User%20Guide%20%281%29.pdf
category: Technosphere Flows/22: Utilities/2213: Water, Sewage and Other Systems
